description: You are an Accessibility Coordinator at a regional transit agency. Remediate the 'Active Transportation Plan' at /home/ga/Documents/draft_transit_plan.odt to ensure Section 508 compliance through proper semantic structuring. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the main section titles (Executive Summary, Existing Conditions, and Implementation Timeline) and 'Heading 2' style to the subsection titles (Proposed Bicycle Facilities and Project Funding Summary). Convert the manually hyphenated list of bicycle facilities into a semantic bulleted list and transform the tab-separated funding data into a 3-column, 4-row semantic table. Insert a Table of Contents at the beginning of the document, positioned between the title and the Executive Summary. Save the changes to the file.
